mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tightening labor markets that boost corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 115 signals expanding manufacturing capacity that drives equity risk premiums higher, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 115.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent decline in both consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening demand that reduces equity valuation multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL and HOUST both decline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in the federal funds rate above 4.75% combined with declining consumer spending (RSAFS) signals a monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.75% and RSAFS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 150k combined with rising unemployment (UNRATE) signals labor market instability that increases equity volatility, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k and UNRATE rises.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in GDP (GDPC1) below 2% combined with rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals stagflation that reduces equity earnings growth prospects, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in 50%+ of instances where GDPC1 falls below 2% and CPIAUCSL increases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 114 combined with rising housing starts (HOUST) signals strong supply-side dynamics that drive equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 114 and HOUST increases.
